ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "calendar_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the item was sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items sold */,
  "sell_category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier referencing the category of the sale */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer (if applicable) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Cash, Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sell_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sell_category_id") REFERENCES sell_categories ("sell_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sell_categories" (
  "sell_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sell category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Electronics, Clothing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sell_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the item associated with the sell category */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level before reorder is necessary */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the item */,
  "selling_price" REAL /* Selling price of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Last date the item was restocked */,
  "next_restock_date" TEXT /* Next expected restock date */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the item is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES sell_categories ("sell_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Salesperson, Manager, Admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active or not */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the day */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of items sold on that day */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the category of sales reported */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES sell_categories ("sell_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action was successful or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
